title: SciField — A multi-axis framework for monitoring scientific field health
description: SciField is a multi-axis framework for monitoring the health of a scientific field. It builds a longitudinal corpus from a defined set of journals, enriches each article with thematic, epistemic, and novelty signals, and uses those signals to forecast where a field is headed. Release v0.1.0 ships the corpus harvester, enrichment pipeline (OpenAlex / Semantic Scholar / ROR / author disambiguation), embedding bake-off, FAISS HNSW index, BERTopic thematic backbone (V1-S06), and the epistemic-extraction scaffolding (V1-S07) with its OSF pre-registration #1.
